author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text:
Me: 🚢?

JS IPFS: 🚢!

Me: 👌

JS IPFS: 🤩

Me: 👋

Yep, 0.37 just shipped with a new constructor, better DNSLink support and delegated routing! 👷‍♂️🌎🧭✨Read all about it https://github.com/ipfs/js-ipfs/issues/2192 cc @IPFSbot #JS #IPFS #dweb
